reference: Hello and welcome to the healthcare center. Pneumonitis means that there is inflammation in the region of the lungs. It usually gets corrected with a course of antibiotics over five to six days. However, we should monitor that the symptoms are decreasing. Have a good day.
text: Hello and welcome to the healthcare center. Pneumonitis means that there is inflammation in the region of the lungs. It usually gets directed with a course of antibiotics over five to six days. However, we should monitor that the symptoms are decreasing. Have a good day.
